Di Benedetto Apr 9 Today’s Stream Following Today’s Storystream Feed refreshed Two hours ago Premium price hike Now the FAA says gamers are the answer to its air traffic controller shortage Jay Peters Two hours ago 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman’s house Stevie Bonifield Two hours ago How to watch the Artemis II astronauts return to Earth Andrew J. Hawkins Two hours ago Advertiser Content From This is the title for the native ad Andrew Webster Two hours ago Gawrsh, Epic might be making a Disney-themed extraction shooter. That’s according to a new report from Bloomberg , which delves into just how important the Disney deal is for Epic, especially given the current state of Fortnite . The extraction shooter is described as the first release to come out of the partnership, and it’s expected to launch in November. Epic Games Pins ‘Fortnite’ Comeback on Disney Partnership [Bloomberg] Link Microsoft finally lets Windows 11 testers unlock experimental features without ViVeTool Tom Warren 6:00 PM UTC Richard Lawler 5:50 PM UTC Artemis II’s heat shield is about to be put to the test. When the four astronauts aboard Orion return to Earth tonight, they’ll rely on a heat shield that NASA has admitted is flawed. Former astronaut Dr. Charlie Camarda told the New York Times that NASA never should’ve launched Artemis II, guessing there’s a 95 percent chance it will return safely. CNN explains Artemis II’s “lofted” entry has been adjusted to try to limit the unexpected charring on the Artemis I heat shield , and National Geographic also went in-depth. YouTube , Netflix , and others will broadcast the landing starting at 6:30PM ET. Gorillaz are launching a new 2D game inspired by their latest album , and the first trailer makes it look a little like a classic Zelda -style adventure. It’s available to subscribers now, but everyone can play on April 14th. Link Amazon Luna axes third-party game purchases Emma Roth 5:31 PM UTC Little Snitch’s software counter surveillance jumps from Mac to Linux Stevie Bonifield 4:57 PM UTC Jay Peters 4:52 PM UTC Roblox’s new Roblox Plus subscription costs $4.99 per month. Launching April 30th, Roblox Plus will give users perks like new Robux every month, discounts on in-game items, and the ability to transfer Robux to other people. Roblox will be stopping new sign-ups for the existing Roblox Premium subscription . Sean Hollister Apr 7 Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they? Gaby Del Valle 3:45 PM UTC Dominic Preston 3:22 PM UTC Samsung’s Z Flip 8 slims down in new leak renders. The fairly reliable leaker OnLeaks has shared his first CAD renders for the Galaxy Z Flip 8, via MyMobiles , and it looks… pretty much identical to the Z Flip 7 , actually. It’s apparently slimmer though, with 0.5mm shaved off when closed, which should make it fractionally more pocketable. Previous Next 1/3 The Flip 8 has the same boxy design and full cover screen as its predecessor according to this leak. Image: OnLeaks / MyMobiles Link Bose’s rugged Soundlink Flex Bluetooth speaker is on sale for up to $50 off Brandon Widder 3:17 PM UTC Andrew Liszewski 3:14 PM UTC Adobe’s ‘computational photography’ camera app is now available for the iPad. After adding support for the iPhone 17 and its square sensor selfie camera last November, Adobe has updated its Project Indigo camera app to support the iPhone 17e and iPads with at least 6GB of RAM. But Adobe warns that “Project Indigo is not yet tuned for iPad operation” and suggests sticking with an iPhone for an “optimal experience.” Project Indigo App - App Store [App Store] Link Emma Roth 2:54 PM UTC Professor Layton is coming to PC and PlayStation for the first time. Arriving later this year, Professor Layton and the New World of Steam will be available on PlayStation 5 and Steam in addition to the Nintendo Switch and Switch 2. There’s still no firm release date for this puzzle-filled title just yet, but you can check out the latest trailer below.
